chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D – 4850 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) Priority. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.20231/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 14.10.2025 Dr. Shahab Imam, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, DAG. ********** Sardar Zafar Hussain Advocate appeared for the Respondent No.2 and by way of assistance to the Court states that the circumstances in this petition are similar to those in C.P. No.D-4011/2025 where this Court had disposed of the petition by order dated 18.08.2025 by directing the Collector to decide the Petitioner’s application under Section 83-B of the Customs Act, 1969. Learned counsel for the Petitioner does not objection to disposal of this petition on same terms. Therefore, we dispose of this petition by directing the Respondent No.2 to decide the Petitioner’s application for release of goods under Section 83-B of the Customs Act, 1969 within four days. The petition along with listed application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE NADEEM QURESHI PA
